functional_purpose: Receives DICOM objects and submits them to the OpenEyes PayloadProcessor. Zeiss IOLMaster objects with supported SOP classes are also written to the IOLMaster import folder.
business_process: Ingesting imaging and biometry from DICOM devices/PACS into OpenEyes.

destination_connectors.name: Write out file to IolMasterImport incoming folder when device is a Zeiss IOLMaster

ack_behaviour: Auto-generates a DICOM response after the source transformer and processes synchronously.
main_filters: Removes the IOLMaster file destination unless manufacturer is Zeiss, model contains iolmaster, and SOP class is supported.
main_transformer_stages: Extract patient, study, device, SOP class, and AE-title DICOM tags.
Derive identifier type and institution ID from local AE title or configurationMap default.
Set source platform from AE title.
Conditionally retain the IOLMaster file destination.
error_handling: No explicit error handling; failed destination behavior is connector default.
retry_behaviour: Destination retryCount is 0 with a configured 10-second interval.
queue_behaviour: Destination queues are disabled; source queue buffer size is 1000.

evidence.claim: DICOM listener on port 11118 with automatic post-transformer response.
evidence.location: Pennine | DICOM_11118 | da67d2ba-db52-4f50-898b-b534d71450ab | Pennine/Default Group.xml | source connector lines 10-29

evidence.claim: Source transformer extracts DICOM metadata, reads configurationMap:defaultPatientIdentifierType, and conditionally removes destination 1 for non-Zeiss/non-IOLMaster/unsupported SOP objects.
evidence.location: Pennine | DICOM_11118 | da67d2ba-db52-4f50-898b-b534d71450ab | Pennine/Default Group.xml | source transformer lines 63-267

evidence.claim: File Writer sends DICOM to /mnt/dicom and HTTP Sender POSTs dicom_request to /api/v1/request/queue/add using preemptive Basic authentication with redacted password.
evidence.location: Pennine | DICOM_11118 | da67d2ba-db52-4f50-898b-b534d71450ab | Pennine/Default Group.xml | destination connectors lines 286-470

functional_purpose: Accepts an HTTP request with a hospital-number parameter, creates an HL7 QBP^Q21 query, sends it to the remote PAS, and returns a transformed response to the HTTP caller.
business_process: Patient demographic lookup in the PAS.
ack_behaviour: Waits for the TCP response, converts it to XML, XSLT-transforms it, and returns the generated response to the HTTP caller.
main_transformer_stages: Set query timestamp and message ID.
Copy HTTP hosnum parameter to QPD.3.
Convert the PAS response from HL7v2 to XML.
XSLT-transform the response and return it.
retry_behaviour: Destination retryCount is 0; MLLP transmission mode permits two retries.
queue_behaviour: All destination queues are disabled; the TCP response is not queued on timeout.

evidence.claim: HTTP Listener on port 6663 converts XML input to HL7v2, sets QPD.3 from the hosnum parameter, and uses an HL7 2.4 QBP^Q21 template.
evidence.location: Pennine | OpenEyes PAS Query | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | Pennine/PAS.xml | source connector and transformer lines 10-134

evidence.claim: TCP Sender uses MLLP to the configured remote PAS port 8400, waits for a response, has retryCount 0, and MLLP maxRetries 2.
evidence.location: Pennine | OpenEyes PAS Query | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | Pennine/PAS.xml | Send Q21 connector lines 143-365

evidence.claim: JavaScript destinations convert the Q21 response to XML, XSLT-transform it, and return TransformedResponse; destination queues are disabled.
evidence.location: Pennine | OpenEyes PAS Query | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | Pennine/PAS.xml | Convert K21 to XML and Create response connectors lines 370-752

functional_purpose: Receives PAS HL7v2 ADT messages, upserts patients and selected appointments through PASAPI V1, and deletes appointments for A38 merge messages.
business_process: Synchronising PAS patient demographics, appointments, attendance changes, and merges with OpenEyes.
ack_behaviour: TCP source uses MLLP with ACK byte 06 and automatic HL7 ACK generation configured for AA, AE, and AR outcomes.
main_filters: Appointment PUT accepts A01, A02, A03, A05, A08, A11, A12, and A13, except A08 where PV1.4 is CANCL.
main_transformer_stages: XSLT-transform the patient message to PASAPI XML.
Extract hospital number, visit ID, visit date/time, clinic and doctor codes, visit status, and partial-record state.
Read patient response ID and warnings.
Transform appointment messages to PASAPI XML.
error_handling: Logs extraction errors; treats the appointment-delete 'resource not found' response as sent.
retry_behaviour: All HTTP destinations have retryCount 0 with a configured 10-second interval.
queue_behaviour: All HTTP destination queues are disabled; source queue buffer size is 1000.
logging: Transformer error handlers log extraction exceptions; the log may include exception details from patient and appointment fields.

evidence.claim: TCP Listener binds port 6662, uses MLLP framing with ACK byte 06, and processes HL7v2 messages.
evidence.location: Pennine | OpenEyes PAS | 6c3a10d1-968d-468e-9355-008946825b20 | Pennine/PAS.xml | source connector lines 10-140

evidence.claim: Patient destination PUTs to PASAPI/V1/Patient, transforms via XSLT, extracts the hospital number, excludes M05, uses preemptive Basic authentication with redacted password, and has queue disabled/retryCount 0.
evidence.location: Pennine | OpenEyes PAS | 6c3a10d1-968d-468e-9355-008946825b20 | Pennine/PAS.xml | PASAPI - Patient connector lines 148-574

evidence.claim: Appointment PUT targets PASAPI/V1/PatientAppointment for A01/A02/A03/A05/A08/A11/A12/A13 events, while DELETE targets the appointment endpoint for A38 and treats the resource-not-found response as sent.
evidence.location: Pennine | OpenEyes PAS | 6c3a10d1-968d-468e-9355-008946825b20 | Pennine/PAS.xml | Clinic List PUT and DELETE connectors lines 578-1007

evidence.claim: Transformer error handlers call logger.error while extracting hospital, visit, clinic, doctor, status, and partial-record values.
evidence.location: Pennine | OpenEyes PAS | 6c3a10d1-968d-468e-9355-008946825b20 | Pennine/PAS.xml | patient destination transformer lines 254-437
